nodes.name: Red-necked avocet
nodes.summary: Red-necked avocet（Red-necked avocet，学名 Recurvirostra novaehollandiae），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，常见栖息地包括湿地。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The birds have a preference for salt or brackish water and are generally found in shallow wetland areas that are either fresh or salt, or on estuarine mudflats. The species is rare in Tasmania and an occasional vagrant to New Zealand.{{cite book |title=[[A Field Guide to Australian Birds (Slater)|A Field Guide to Australian Birds: Vol.1
